errors.network: No internet connection. Please check your network and try again.
errors.server: A server error occurred. Please try again.
errors.timeout: The request timed out. Please try again.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to access this page.
errors.not_found: The requested page was not found.
errors.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.validation: Please check the information you entered.

login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Sign in to your MyMoney account.
login.email_error: Please enter a valid email address.
login.error_account_locked: Your account has been temporarily locked due to multiple failed attempts. Please try again later.
login.error_account_inactive: This account is inactive. Please contact support.
login.error_email_not_confirmed: Please confirm your email address first. Check your inbox.
login.session_ended: Your session has ended. Please sign in again.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Create your MyMoney account.
register.email_error: Please enter a valid email address.
register.email_taken: This email address is already registered.
register.password_error: Password does not meet the requirements.
register.display_name_en_hint: Auto-filled from your name — you can edit it.
register.date_of_birth_error: Date of birth cannot be in the future.
register.profile_image_error_type: Only JPG and PNG images are allowed.
register.profile_image_error_size: Image size exceeds the maximum allowed (5 MB).
register.confirmation_note: A confirmation link will be sent to your email.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.email_error: Please enter a valid email address.
forgot.hint: Check your inbox and spam folder after submitting.
forgot.success_message: If your email is registered, you'll receive a reset link shortly.

reset.title: Reset Password
reset.subtitle: Enter a strong new password for your account.
reset.password_error: Password does not meet the requirements.
reset.success_message: Your password has been changed successfully. You can now sign in.
reset.invalid_token: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
reset.expired_token: This reset link has expired. Please request a new one.

confirm_email.title: Email Confirmation
confirm_email.success_message: Your email has been confirmed successfully. Your account is ready.
confirm_email.error_message: This link is invalid or has expired.
confirm_email.expired_message: This confirmation link has expired. You can request a new one.
confirm_email.invalid_token: This confirmation link is invalid or has expired.
confirm_email.resend_success_message: If your email is registered and unconfirmed, you'll receive a new confirmation link shortly.

change_password.heading: Change Password
change_password.subheading: Choose a strong password to protect your account.
change_password.new_password_error: Password does not meet the requirements.
change_password.success_message: Your password has been changed successfully.
change_password.error_same_password: New password must be different from the current one.

dashboard.heading: Dashboard
dashboard.subheading: Monitor your financial performance from one place.

profile.heading: Profile
profile.avatar_hint: JPG, PNG or WebP — max 5 MB
profile.email_change_success: A confirmation link has been sent to your new email. Check your inbox.
profile.email_pending_desc: A confirmation link was sent to:
profile.email_pending_hint: Check your new inbox and click the confirmation link.
profile.email_pending_cancel_confirm: Cancel the pending email change request?

settings.heading: Settings
settings.change_password_desc: Choose a strong password to protect your account. Your current session stays active after changing.
settings.sessions_desc: View and manage active login sessions for your account across all devices.
settings.sessions_revoke_others_confirm: Revoke all other sessions? Your current session will remain active.
settings.sessions_revoke_others_success: All other sessions have been revoked.
settings.sessions_sign_out_confirm: Sign out this device? You will be redirected to the login page.
settings.confirm_email_change_success_message: Your email address has been changed successfully. Please sign in again.
settings.confirm_email_change_error_message: The link is invalid, expired, or has already been used.

errors_page.404_message: Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
errors_page.500_message: A server error occurred. Please try again later.
